inputarrow.display_name: Arrow that is anchored at its tip, useful for block diagrams.

trarrow.display_name: Arrow the same size of currarrow but only filled.

flowarrow.display_name: Arrow used for the flows, with a text anchor

pentode suppressor to cathode.display_name: Pentode with suppressor grid connected to cathode

en amp.display_name: Operational amplifier compliant to DIN/EN 60617 standard

inst amp ra.display_name: instrumentation amplifier with amplification resistance terminals

ieeestd schmitt port.display_name: Schmitt port matched to IEEE standard ports

ieeestd invschmitt port.display_name: Inverting Schmitt port matched to IEEE standard ports

schmitt symbol.display_name: Schmitt symbol to add to input pins if needed

wedgeinv.display_name: Inversion marker for European logic symbols

triac.display_name: Standard triac (shape depends on package option)

thyristor.display_name: Standard thyristor (shape depends on package option)

put.display_name: Standard Programmable Unipolar Transistor (shape depends on package option)

gto.display_name: Standard GTO (shape depends on package option)

gtobar.display_name: Standard GTO with bar-type gate (shape depends on package option)

agtobar.display_name: Standard GTO with bar-type gate on anode (shape depends on package option)

nullator.display_name: Nullator element (virtual short circuit; forces V and I to zero)

norator.display_name: Norator element (admits any combination of V and I)

rmeter.display_name: Round meter (use t=... for the symbol)

rmeterwa.display_name: Round meter with arrow (use t=... for the symbol)

smeter.display_name: Square meter (use t=... for the symbol)

twoport.display_name: generic two port (use t=… to specify text)

twoportsplit.display_name: generic two port split (use t1=… and t2=… to specify text)

amp.display_name: amplifier; use t=… to add a text

iamp.display_name: instrumentation amplifier; use t=… to add a text

normally open push button closed.display_name: Normally open push button (in closed position)

normally closed push button open.display_name: Normally closed push button (in open position)
